subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh the truth and enjoineth upon mankind that which bringeth them nearer unto Him. Verily, He is the Most Bountiful, the Most Generous. That which was ordained hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق و یامر الناس بما یقربهم الیه انه هو الفیاض الکریم قد ظهر ما کان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
